feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Refresh Object Page after Action Execution with Custom Entity
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am using the RAP Model with a Custom Entity and have implemented an Unmanaged Behavior Definition. I want to refresh the Object Page after executing an action.

However, since the Custom Entity does not have a projection, I cannot use the "use side effects" syntax in the projection. I have tried using "side effects affect ..." but the Object Page does not refresh.

Is there any way to refresh the Object Page when using a Custom Entity in RAP?

Thank a lot.

entry.title: how to bring consolidation group in the public cloud in EWM
entry.content: how to bring consolidation group in the public cloud? Please revert at the earliest

entry.title: Mass output management - FI accounting
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a requirement for our current client, who is using an S/4HANA Public Cloud package, to automatically generate forms to be sent via email to customers, based on FI invoices.

Is it possible to achieve this automation and mass management through the Fiori app "Output Parameter Determination" (please note that we are not using FI-CA)?

The requirements are as follows:

  • Form generation must be automatic upon FI invoice creation.
  • Mass form generation and sending are mandatory.

Best regards,

Constant

entry.title: The Field "DONOTCHECKMATERIAL" not available in the Billing document request ODATAV4 API
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement to create the billing document using external data using API's. So we are trying to implement the External billing document request  ODATA V4 API. while analyzing the entities and structure, we are not able to find the field  "DONOTCHECKMATERIAL". this is a critical requirement as they don't have materials for billing purpose. please check and guide us with the possible solution.

The API references are as follows :
Overview | Billing Document Request | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

The reference from the help portal :
Billing Document Request | SAP Help Portal


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: GR Print Preview in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello all,

Is it possible to check the print preview before or right after conducting a Goods Receipt using the "Post Good Receipt for Purchasing Document" APP?

Thank you.

entry.title: sampling scheme ISO sampling templates
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Previously, my colleague tested the sampling scheme in the quality management module of the ByDesign product, and the system could directly apply the ISO sampling templates.

May I ask if S/4HANA Public Cloud also provides similar templates that can be applied?

Below is the ByDesign screen for reference.

Thank you!

entry.title: Restriction for changing specific Material Master data?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We would like to know if there is a way to restrict authorization to change specific Material master data items (YB-0000 and YP-0000).

We have checked the restrictions for business roles but it seems impossible to allow changes for only certain material master items.

Could you give us some advice on this?

Best Regards,

Fujita

entry.title: Unable to change Product Base Unit due to "Routings already exist that are assigned to the material"
entry.content:
We have created a Product the wrong Base unit of measurement as 'EA'. Now we have to change the Base unit of measurement as 'M'. When we try to change the unit of measurement in Change material ( MM02) Tile - System is showing error. We have checked the error in "Display Error". System is showing Quality plan group number. Actually Quality plan is deleted from our end through app Change Inspection Plan  (QP02 ) but still we're getting this error "Routings already exist that are assigned to the material".

Please guide us to change the UOM.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales Order Created via Client Certificate Authentication Classified as Digital Access
entry.content:
Customer is using SAP Business Process Automation (BPA) to create a Sales Order in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition) by calling OData API.

The API call is made using a client certificate authentication destination in SAP BTP, where the keystore is created from the service key of the SAP Build Process Automation subscription.

Given this setup, the created Sales Order is classified as a Digital Access document.

 

  • Is it expected that Sales Orders created via client certificate authentication are counted under Digital Access?
  • Would using a Named User with Basic Authentication or Oauth2 User token exchange authentication instead of a service key avoid the Digital Access classification?

Thanks.

entry.title: How to set up multi-currency bank?
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

In S/4 HANA Public Cloud, I want to know how to set up multi-currency in one bank. 

Please suggest

Thanks,

May

entry.title: Unable to close project / WBS
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for enterprise portfolio and project management 

Dear SAP community, 

We receive the below error when we try to close the project in "Project Control" application. 

"There is still a purchase document commitment for WBS M.****** "

We checked all the purchase orders associated to this project, but there are no open items or open documents with pending GR / IR or no pending commitments. 

Please suggest solutions. 

Thank you very much and best Regards,

Madhuri

entry.title: Problem moving GL account to QAS
entry.content:
We are trying to move an G/L account to QAS through a request and the account is not being created in QAS.

entry.title: Unable to create delivery of return sales order in public cloud.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

In public cloud, return sales order type CBRE, I am unable to create delivery of return sales order, when trying to create delivery I am getting below error. 

I have created return sales order with reference to Billing document.

Please help me with the configuration.

entry.title: Automatic Batch Determination Issue in EWM (S/4HANA Cloud 2502)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,
We (on the customer’s side) are currently in an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud implementation project, transitioning to the 2502 release. We've encountered a significant issue with automatic batch determination in our EWM-managed storage locations, and we are looking for insights from the community.

In the previous 2408 release, we observed that automatic batch determination was functioning correctly during outbound delivery creation. However, after upgrading to 2502, this functionality has ceased.
Our automatic batch determination is based on Condition Records. Specifically, we have configured condition records that define a minimum BBD (Best Before Date) for each customer and product combination. This ensures that customers receive products with an acceptable remaining shelf life.

The issue we are facing is that the system is no longer automatically selecting batches based on these condition records in the EWM warehouse during outbound delivery creation. We understand that with EWM managed storage locations, the final batch selection is done in EWM.
Given that this functionality was working in 2408, and is now failing in 2502, we suspect either a change in standard behavior or a potential misconfiguration on our end.

We have opened an SAP case regarding this issue. So far, SAP support has indicated that automatic batch determination is not possible in EWM-managed storage locations, and that only manual batch determination is available. However, we interpret note 3400017 as indicating that automatic batch determination can happen in EWM.

Our questions are:
1. Has anyone successfully configured automatic batch determination in EWM in version 2502, and if so, could you share your configuration approach?
2. Are there any known changes in the 2502 release that could affect automatic batch determination in EWM-managed storage locations?
3. Could anyone suggest specific configuration steps or checks we should perform to ensure our Condition Records are correctly being processed by EWM for batch determination?
Any help here would be really appreciated

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Log for Financial Plan Data upload
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

While uploading Financial Plan Data there is the possibility to see the log for the uploaded Financial Plan Data. However, we are missing the information on what was uploaded, there is no information about it.

App: Import Financial Plan Data -->Open Application Log

 

Is there a possibility to get more information about it? It's crucial for us to see what values our business users have uploaded.

 

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: Cannot add Search Help to Custom Field - "No suitable value help key field exists" error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I made a Custom Field in the customizing client of our dev system (S/4HANA Public Cloud - 3 system landscape) through the Custom Fields app. I have a requirement to add search help to this custom field. For this purpose, I made a custom CDS view through the Custom CDS Views app. However, when I try to bind this CDS through the "Value Help View" field, the error message "No suitable value help key field exists" appears:

 

Here is the setup of my custom CDS view:

What am I missing? Any help is welcome. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Mass changes to purchasing info record
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 

while doing mass changes in info record we got error while in application job 

error message :-INSERT A MEDICATION IN THE COMPONENT MM-PUR-GF-MAS

What does it means any authorization missing or anything else on this ...?

entry.title: S/4 HANA public cloud be one of the Multi-ERP (FPC) architecture with Ariba instance
entry.content: Can Ariba integration for multi-ERP (Federated Process Control) architecture support as one of the backends  for S/4 Hana public cloud instance with other SAP back-ends technically feasible in Parent - Child Ariba realm setup?

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud | Cost Estimation by Batch
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

My client (semiconductor manufacturing) is planning to use SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. There is a requirement where they wants to analyse costs and manage price according to batches.

This case applies to Make to Stock (MTS) business process.

For Example if I have 1 Semi-Finished Goods (SFG) A with two batches A.1, A.2. Each batch is manufactured with a different cost, due to batch A.2 consumed more raw materials/overhead costs than planned. 

Next these two batches A.1, A.2 are consumed in Production Orders to produce Finished-Goods (FG). Because these 2 SFG batches have different costs, the FG manufactured by these 2 batches have different costs as well.

And they want these costs to be reflected when they choose the FG to sell to customers - that is - when they choose the FG to sell, they can choose batches in this FG, with price of each batch referenced correctly from costs collected to manufacture them.

Currently I know if we use standard price for FG, the cost for all Production Orders will be collected in Pricediff, then distributed all to inventory/COGS based on quantity. All batches of 1 FG will have same price.

Is there a way to do this in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public? I tried to use this case Solved: Batch wise costing SAP public cloud - SAP Community but the links for costing don't work, and I know SAP has removed standard cost estimation by split valuation. Mixed costing does not work as well, since all batches they use are manufacturing batches.

Kindly enlighten me on this issue.

entry.title: 在进行应收汇票的批量认领导入时，提示抵销科目的问题，提示未在公司代码中定义，请指教下，如何处理的
entry.content: #SAP S4HANA Cloud #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance#，在进行应收汇票的批量认领导入时，提示抵销科目的问题，提示未在公司代码中定义，请指教下，如何处理的
